cards.title: Latency, Power, and Local Action
cards.governance_note: Review response-time deadlines, power budgets, local control rules, and edge-vs-cloud tradeoffs.

cards.title: Sensors, Offline Operation, and Fail-Safe Design
cards.governance_note: Review sensor validation, offline behavior, local fallback, fail-safe mode, and decision traces.

cards.title: Firmware, Security, and Device Lifecycle
cards.governance_note: Audit signed updates, rollback, secure boot, diagnostics, data minimization, end-of-life, and fleet governance.
